title: Eastern Cape launches Safer Festive Season Plan
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Eastern Cape MEC...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Eastern Cape MEC for Community Safety and Transport, Xolile Nqatha, officially launched Safety Month 2025 and unveiled the Sarah Baartman District Safer Festive Season Operational Plan for 2025/2026 in Graaff-Reinet on 5 November.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Eastern Cape MEC for Community Safety and Transport, Xolile Nqatha, officially launched Safety Month 2025 and unveiled the Sarah Baartman District Safer Festive Season Operational Plan for 2025/2026 in Graaff-Reinet on 5 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event opened with a captivating display by members of the South African Police Service Drill Unit, whose precision and discipline drew enthusiastic applause from the crowd."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This was followed by the Mounted Unit, whose dignified presence on horseback will help bring control and community engagement during the busy holiday period.","html":"This was followed by the Mounted Unit, whose dignified presence on horseback will help bring control and community engagement during the busy holiday period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Dog Unit also impressed with demonstrations of obedience, tracking and detection, showcasing the critical role of canine policing in crime prevention.","html":"The Dog Unit also impressed with demonstrations of obedience, tracking and detection, showcasing the critical role of canine policing in crime prevention."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adding an educational element, the Public Order Policing Unit conducted a live crowd management display, illustrating non-violent tactics and formation strategies used to maintain safety during large public gatherings.","html":"Adding an educational element, the Public Order Policing Unit conducted a live crowd management display, illustrating non-violent tactics and formation strategies used to maintain safety during large public gatherings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fully ready","html":"Fully ready"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Addressing the gathering, the Acting District Commissioner of the Sarah Baartman Municipality, Brigadier Asogran Naidoo, declared the district’s full state of readiness for the festive season.","html":"Addressing the gathering, the Acting District Commissioner of the Sarah Baartman Municipality, Brigadier Asogran Naidoo, declared the district’s full state of readiness for the festive season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He emphasised collaboration with stakeholders to combat serious and violent crimes - particularly gender-based violence and femicide (GBVF), armed robberies, illicit economic activities, and wildlife trafficking.","html":"He emphasised collaboration with stakeholders to combat serious and violent crimes - particularly gender-based violence and femicide (GBVF), armed robberies, illicit economic activities, and wildlife trafficking."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unity creates strength","html":"Unity creates strength"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Head of the Department of Community Safety, Frank Mbambo, highlighted the importance of unity in tackling seasonal crime spikes.","html":"Head of the Department of Community Safety, Frank Mbambo, highlighted the importance of unity in tackling seasonal crime spikes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Without holding hands and making sure we deal with criminality during this period, we will face serious challenges such as alcohol abuse and domestic violence,” he said.","html":"“Without holding hands and making sure we deal with criminality during this period, we will face serious challenges such as alcohol abuse and domestic violence,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The community is at the core of fighting corruption and criminality. We must work together - the justice cluster and communities alike.”","html":"“The community is at the core of fighting corruption and criminality. We must work together - the justice cluster and communities alike.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mbambo further reiterated the campaign’s theme, “Musa ukuthula kusonakala” (Do not keep quiet when things go wrong), calling for active community involvement and vigilance.","html":"Mbambo further reiterated the campaign’s theme, “Musa ukuthula kusonakala” (Do not keep quiet when things go wrong), calling for active community involvement and vigilance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Operational plan","html":"Operational plan"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unveiling the operational plan, Naidoo noted that it focuses on the root causes of community pain.","html":"Unveiling the operational plan, Naidoo noted that it focuses on the root causes of community pain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The strategy includes targeted operations on liquor outlets, curbing underage drinking, stop-and-search initiatives, and efforts against drug dealing, illegal firearms, undocumented persons, and gender-based violence.","html":"The strategy includes targeted operations on liquor outlets, curbing underage drinking, stop-and-search initiatives, and efforts against drug dealing, illegal firearms, undocumented persons, and gender-based violence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Road safety will also be a priority, with intensified traffic monitoring and roadblocks along major routes including the N2, N9, N10 and R72, which have seen high accident rates.","html":"Road safety will also be a priority, with intensified traffic monitoring and roadblocks along major routes including the N2, N9, N10 and R72, which have seen high accident rates."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The province will deploy a robust traffic policing and road safety strategy to reduce fatalities during the festive period.","html":"The province will deploy a robust traffic policing and road safety strategy to reduce fatalities during the festive period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]

images.alt: Eastern Cape launches Safer Festive Season Plan
